title: Harpic Active Fresh Toiler Cleaner Gel, Marine Splash, Pack of 1
features: Leaves your toilet smelling fresh for hours
Easily reaches under the toilet rim
description: Product Description Harpic Active Fresh Citrus Zest toilet cleaner combines a wonderful citrussy fragrance with a thick formula to make the ultimate freshener for your loo! It reaches under the rim to kill 99.9% of bacteria, removes limescale and leaves your loo smelling fresh for hours!. Ingredients Per 100 g of product contains 0.29 g alkyl (C12-16) dimethylbenzyl ammonium chloride (ADBAC). Contains <5% non-ionic surfactants, disinfectants, perfumes. Safety Warning Precautions Harpic active fresh marine splash. Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Keep out of reach of children. If on skin: wash with plenty of soap and water. If skin irritation occurs: get medical attention. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: get medical attention. See more
